about.label: About Us
about.title: Technology Experts with a Global Vision
about.story: Founded by former DJI engineers, we bring deep expertise in spatial intelligence and smart hardware to the European market. With registered entities in the Netherlands and Germany, we bridge leading Chinese technology brands with European industry needs.
